name: Lemon Blueberry Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients.
2. Combine the yogurt, egg, butter, and lemon peel; stir into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
3. Fold in the blueberries.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15-18 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Combine the glaze ingredients.
7. Drizzle over warm biscuits.
